label: two-cell-witness
headline_statement: Under Assumptions~\ref{ass:exact-ate}--\ref{ass:kernel-observable} and \ref{ass:two-cell}, the two-cell matrices yield \(\Delta_{\mathrm{ADML},n}=0\), \(0<\lim_{n\to\infty}\Delta_{\mathrm{LRO},n}=\eta_A/(1+\lambda^2)<\eta_A=\lim_{n\to\infty}\Delta_{\mathrm{DML},n}\), centered point-statistic equivalence, and strict Wald half-length ratios.
